name: Ginkgo Bioworks Holdings, Inc.
description: Ginkgo Bioworks Holdings, Inc. operates a horizontal platform for cell programming, designed to enable the biological production of products across diverse markets including agriculture, pharmaceuticals, food, and specialty chemicals. The company's platform utilizes advanced software, automation, and data analytics to design, write, and debug DNA codes, allowing customers to program cells as easily as computers. Through its foundry and codebase, Ginkgo Bioworks provides end-to-end services to accelerate the development of bio-based products and solutions.
